nation: Mississaugas of Scugog Island First Nation
one_time_description: Prior period restatement: realized investment gains not previously reported in operations, correcting unrealized gains/losses calculation errors in prior years
economic_notes: Noozhoo Nokiiyan LP operates commercial operations including resource centre, cottage and small business centre rentals. Subsequent to year end, NNLP purchased majority stake in Sky Canoe Inc for $1,940,757. FNFA debt of $16.5M for capital projects. Committed capital projects include wastewater/well $4.6M, residential buildings $3M, Sky Canoe building $1.3M.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Significant prior period restatement (Note 28) correcting investment gains/losses calculation - restated 2022 accumulated surplus from $175M to $190M. Short-term debt of $16,609,895 (FNFA and CMHC Phase 6) not yet in principal repayment period, excluded from long_term_debt. Five consolidated subsidiaries: Noozhoo Nokiiyan GP Inc., Noozhoo Nokiiyan LP, MSIFN (Island Road) Holdings Inc., 2810351 Ontario Inc., 10000225546 Ontario Ltd. Large investment portfolio of ~$109M. Community Betterment Fund $107M and Future Generations Fund $35M represent significant restricted reserves. No schedule of remuneration for chief/council included in extracted text.
